name: Lima Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 packages frozen baby lima beans (10 oz each)
2 cans mushrooms with juice, drained (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last two in a crockpot.
2. Stir well and cover.
3. Cook on low for 10-12 hours.
4. Just before serving, stir in cream and mix well.
5. Sprinkle with cheese.
